name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, bounded Ground Route Authority, station-area freshness invalidation, safe GUI layout fallback, and 0.1.638 crash-safety containment: bootstrap resource governor disabled by default and generic inventory deposits constrained to station/container chest storage instead of machine/furnace result inventories.
